cards.title: A Necessary Ache in Fatherhood
cards.body: Regret is one of fatherhood's greatest teachers, awakening fathers to their shortcomings. It guides men toward repair and helps them become wiser parents.

cards.title: Emotional Regulation: Finding That Sweet Spot
cards.body: The coping skills we developed as children often don't work in adulthood. Learn how to upgrade your emotional regulation skills and use emotions as information.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Family estrangement exists on a continuum rather than as a binary choice. Support plays an important role whether or not people seek reconciliation.
